# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for insecure deserialization and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any unsafe deserialization of untrusted data into executable objects, complex runtime state, or unsafe object graphs.
4. Replace unsafe deserialization with safer data-only formats and explicit validation.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

# config/initializers/session_store.rb
Rails.application.config.session_store :cookie_store, key: '_app_session'

# app/services/secure_session_serializer.rb
class SecureSessionSerializer
  def self.dump(value)
    JSON.generate(sanitize_for_storage(value))
  end

  def self.load(value)
    return nil if value.nil?
    data = JSON.parse(value)
    validate_and_reconstruct(data)
  rescue JSON::ParserError
    nil
  end

  private

  def self.sanitize_for_storage(value)
    case value
    when Hash
      value.transform_values { |v| sanitize_for_storage(v) }
    when Array
      value.map { |v| sanitize_for_storage(v) }
    when String, Integer, Float, TrueClass, FalseClass, NilClass
      value
    when Symbol
      { '__type' => 'symbol', 'value' => value.to_s }
    when Time, DateTime, Date
      { '__type' => 'time', 'value' => value.iso8601 }
    else
      value.to_s
    end
  end

  def self.validate_and_reconstruct(data)
    case data
    when Hash
      if data['__type']
        case data['__type']
        when 'symbol'
          data['value'].to_sym
        when 'time'
          Time.parse(data['value'])
        else
          data
        end
      else
        data.transform_values { |v| validate_and_reconstruct(v) }
      end
    when Array
      data.map { |v| validate_and_reconstruct(v) }
    when String, Integer, Float, TrueClass, FalseClass, NilClass
      data
    else
      nil
    end
  end
end

Rails.application.config.action_dispatch.cookies_serializer = SecureSessionSerializer

# app/controllers/application_controller.rb
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  protect_from_forgery with: :exception

  private

  def store_session_data(key, value)
    session[key] = value
  end

  def retrieve_session_data(key)
    session[key]
  end

  def clear_session_data
    reset_session
  end
end

# app/controllers/sessions_controller.rb
class SessionsController < ApplicationController
  def create
    user = User.find_by(email: params[:email])
    
    if user&.authenticate(params[:password])
      store_session_data(:user_id, user.id)
      store_session_data(:username, user.username)
      store_session_data(:logged_in_at, Time.current)
      
      render json: { success: true, message: 'Logged in successfully' }
    else
      render json: { success: false, message: 'Invalid credentials' }, status: :unauthorized
    end
  end

  def show
    user_id = retrieve_session_data(:user_id)
    
    if user_id
      user = User.find_by(id: user_id)
      render json: { 
        user_id: user_id,
        username: retrieve_session_data(:username),
        logged_in_at: retrieve_session_data(:logged_in_at)
      }
    else
      render json: { message: 'Not logged in' }, status: :unauthorized
    end
  end

  def destroy
    clear_session_data
    render json: { success: true, message: 'Logged out successfully' }
  end
end

# config/application.rb
module YourApp
  class Application < Rails::Application
    config.load_defaults 7.0
    
    config.session_store :cookie_store, 
      key: '_secure_session',
      secure: Rails.env.production?,
      httponly: true,
      same_site: :lax,
      expire_after: 24.hours
    
    config.action_dispatch.cookies_serializer = SecureSessionSerializer
  end
end
